---
title: ""
---

<div class="home-grid">
<div>
<img src="assets/photo.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Jean de Oliveira"/>
</div>
<div>
<div class="name-block">
<div class="display-name">Jean de Oliveira</div>
<p><strong>PhD Candidate in Economics</strong><br/>Goethe University Frankfurt</p>
</div>
<hr/>
<p>I am a PhD candidate at Goethe University Frankfurt (Graduate School of Economics, Finance and Management). I study how trust and beliefs drive economic behavior, with applications in household finance, development, and environmental economics.</p>
<div class="contact-block">
Contact: <a href="mailto:jeanoli@stud.uni-frankfurt.de">jeanoli@stud.uni-frankfurt.de</a><br/><br/>
<a href="cv.pdf" class="cv-link">Curriculum Vitae</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Working Papers

<!-- NOTE: JMP designation confirmed as Jean's preference. Verify with Haliassos before publishing. -->

::: {.paper}
[**Branches and Roots: Banking Presence and Deforestation in Amazonian Indigenous Lands**]{.paper-title} <!-- [Job Market Paper]{.jmp-label} -->

[With Douglas K.G. de Araujo]{.paper-authors}

[Each additional bank branch near an indigenous territory in the Amazon reduces cumulative forest loss by 1.7 km² over five years — not through income effects, but through social capital: branches increase local interactions, build community ties, and reduce criminal networks' capacity to operate.]{.paper-summary}

[PDF *(coming soon)*]{.paper-btn .paper-btn--pdf} [Interactive Online Appendix](appendix-branches-and-roots/){.paper-btn}
:::

::: {.paper}
[**Actual and Perceived Financial Knowledge over the Life Cycle**]{.paper-title}

[What happens when households believe they know more than they actually do about financial matters? In this paper, I use empirical evidence and theory to show that overconfidence causally leads households to drain their retirement savings early, fall behind on their mortgages, and lean too heavily on credit cards, with the damage worst of all in retirement.]{.paper-summary}

[PDF](papers/actual-perceived-financial-knowledge.pdf){.paper-btn .paper-btn--pdf}
:::

## Work in Progress

::: {.paper}
[**Too Uncertain to Listen: Trust and the Updating of Household Inflation Expectations**]{.paper-title}

[With Michael Haliassos and Johannes Zahner]{.paper-authors}
:::

::: {.paper}
[**Causal Effects of War Framing on Inflation Expectations**]{.paper-title}

[With Michael Haliassos and Johannes Zahner]{.paper-authors}
:::


---

## Publications

*In Engineering*

**New Technologies for Newborn Safety**

::: {.publication}
[[Patent]]{.patent-label} [**Oral Feeding Readiness Prediction System for Neonates.**](https://doi.org/10.8080/1020240010931)
Korean Intellectual Property Office, 2024.
:::

::: {.publication}
[**Quantitative non-nutritive sucking measurement as a predictor of oral feeding readiness in newborns.**](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fped.2023.1143416/full) (*Frontiers in Pediatrics*, 2023)

[With Kyeong Jae Lee, Yong Beom Shin, Ho Eun Park, Suro Choi, Daun Hong, Sohee Kim, and Jin A Yoon]{.paper-authors}
:::

::: {.publication}
[**A silver nanowire-based flexible pressure sensor to measure the non-nutritive sucking power of neonates.**](https://mnsl-journal.springeropen.com/articles/10.1186/s40486-020-00121-0) (*Micro & Nano Systems Letters*, 2020)

[With Tausif Muhammad and Sohee Kim]{.paper-authors}
:::
